entries.prompt: Define time to first token in one sentence.
entries.expected_output: Time to first token is the delay between sending a request and receiving the first generated token.

entries.prompt: Explain why batching improves throughput for LLM serving.
entries.expected_output: Batching improves throughput by letting the GPU process multiple requests together and reducing per-request overhead.

entries.prompt: What is voice activity detection used for in a speech pipeline?
entries.expected_output: Voice activity detection identifies speech regions so downstream ASR only processes segments that contain speech.
